card.name: Action News Crew
card.property: Vigilance Channel — {6}, Discard this card: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Draw a card.

card.name: Agent Bishop, Man in Black
card.property: At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures.

card.name: April O'Neil, Kunoichi Trainee
card.property: When April O'Neil enters, scry 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.) April O'Neil can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater.

card.name: Dimensional Exile
card.property: Enchant basic land you control When this Aura enters, exile target creature an opponent controls until this Aura leaves the battlefield.

card.name: East Wind Avatar
card.property: Flying, vigilance Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Featherbrained Filcher
card.property: Flying When this creature leaves the battlefield, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Grounded for Life
card.property: This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a tapped creature. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Hamato Guardian Stance
card.property: Target creature gets +1/+3 and gains flying until end of turn. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

card.name: High-Flying Ace
card.property: Flying {3}{W}: Target creature without flying gains flying until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Jennika, Bad Apple Big Sister
card.property: When Jennika enters, create a 2/2 red Mutant creature token. Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Koya, Death from Above
card.property: Flying When Koya enters, exile up to one other target creature. At the beginning of the next end step, you may pay {3}{B}. If you don't, return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: The Last Ronin's Technique
card.property: Sneak {1}{W} (You may cast this spell for {1}{W} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Create three 1/1 white Ninja Turtle Spirit creature tokens. If this spell's sneak cost was paid, they enter tapped and attacking.

card.name: Leader's Talent
card.property: (Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.) Whenever you attack, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature. {2}{W}: Level 2 Whenever a creature you control leaves the battlefield, if it had a counter on it, you gain 2 life. {3}{W}: Level 3 Whenever you cast a spell, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Leonardo, Big Brother
card.property: Sneak {W} (You may cast this spell for {W} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Leonardo gets +1/+0 for each other creature you control.

card.name: Leonardo, Cutting Edge
card.property: Sneak {W} (You may cast this spell for {W} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Lifelink Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Leonardo.

card.name: Leonardo, Leader in Blue
card.property: Sneak {3}{W}{W} (You may cast this spell for {3}{W}{W} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) When Leonardo enters, if his sneak cost was paid, creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. {1}{W}: Leonardo gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Leonardo, Sewer Samurai
Leonardo's Technique
card.property: Sneak {1}{W} (You may cast this spell for {1}{W} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Return one or two target creature cards each with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Lita, Little Orphan Amphibian
card.property: Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn. • Put a +1/+1 counter on Lita. • Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") • Scry 1.

card.name: Make Your Move
card.property: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Mighty Mutanimals
card.property: When this creature enters, create a 2/2 red Mutant creature token. Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Prehistoric Pet
card.property: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. {1}{W}, {T}: Return another target creature you control to its owner's hand. Activate only during your turn.

card.name: Quintessential Katana
card.property: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage, untap it and you gain 2 life." Whenever a Ninja you control enters, you may attach this Equipment to it. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Sally Pride, Lioness Leader
card.property: When Sally Pride enters, create X 2/2 red Mutant creature tokens, where X is the number of nontoken creatures you control. Whenever Sally Pride attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Triceraton Commander
card.property: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, Dinosaurs you control other than this creature get +1/+1 and gain flying until end of turn. When this creature enters, create X 2/2 white Dinosaur Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: Turncoat Kunoichi
card.property: Sneak {2}{W}{B} (You may cast this spell for {2}{W}{B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. It enters tapped and attacking.) When this creature enters, choose target creature an opponent controls. Exile that creature until this creature leaves the battlefield. If this creature's sneak cost was paid, instead exile the chosen creature.

card.name: Turtles Forever
card.property: Search your library and/or outside the game for exactly four legendary creature cards you own with different names, then reveal those cards. An opponent chooses two of them. Put the chosen cards into your hand and shuffle the rest into your library.

card.name: Uneasy Alliance
card.property: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block. {5}, Sacrifice this Aura: Exile enchanted creature. You create a 1/1 black Ninja creature token. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: April O'Neil, Hacktivist
card.property: At the beginning of your end step, draw a card for each card type among spells you've cast this turn.

card.name: April, Reporter of the Weird
card.property: Whenever April deals combat damage to a player, draw that many cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Bespoke Bō
card.property: When this Equipment enters, return up to one other target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Equipped creature gets +2/+1 and has vigilance. Equip {3} ({3}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Buzz Bots
card.property: Flying, vigilance When this creature dies, draw a card.

card.name: Crustacean Commando
card.property: When this creature enters, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Does Machines
card.property: (Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.) When this Class enters, mill two cards, draw two cards, then discard two cards. {1}{U}: Level 2 When this Class becomes level 2, return up to two target artifact cards from your graveyard to your hand. {4}{U}: Level 3 At the beginning of combat on your turn, put three +1/+1 counters on target artifact you control. If it isn't a creature, it becomes a 0/0 Robot creature in addition to its other types.

card.name: Donatello, Gadget Master
card.property: Sneak {1}{U} (You may cast this spell for {1}{U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Whenever Donatello deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of target artifact you control.

card.name: Donatello, Mutant Mechanic
card.property: {T}: Put three +1/+1 counters on target artifact you control. If it isn't a creature, it becomes a 0/0 Robot creature in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery. Whenever an artifact you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, if it had counters on it, put those counters on up to one target artifact or creature you control.

card.name: Donatello, Turtle Techie
card.property: When Donatello enters, if you control an artifact, draw a card.

card.name: Donatello, Way with Machines
card.property: Flying Whenever an artifact you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Donatello.

card.name: Donatello's Technique
card.property: Sneak {U} (You may cast this spell for {U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Draw two cards.

card.name: Fugitive Droid
card.property: This creature can't be blocked if an artifact entered the battlefield under your control this turn. {U}, Sacrifice this creature: Counter target spell that targets an artifact or creature you control.

card.name: Kitsune, Dragon's Daughter
card.property: Vigilance Whenever Kitsune enters or deals combat damage to a player, you may exchange control of two other target creatures controlled by different players.

card.name: Kitsune's Technique
card.property: Sneak {1}{U} (You may cast this spell for {1}{U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Target opponent mills half their library, rounded up.

card.name: Krang, Master Mind
card.property: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) When Krang enters, if you have fewer than four cards in hand, draw cards equal to the difference. Krang gets +1/+0 for each other artifact you control.

card.name: Metalhead
card.property: When Metalhead enters, return up to one other target artifact or creature to its owner's hand. {R}, Sacrifice another artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on Metalhead. He gains menace and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Mind Transfer Protocol
card.property: Until end of turn, target artifact or creature becomes an artifact creature with base power and toughness 4/5. Draw a card.

card.name: Mondo Gecko
card.property: {1}, Discard a card: Until end of turn, Mondo Gecko becomes the color of your choice and gains hexproof from that color. Whenever Mondo Gecko deals combat damage to a player, draw a card for each color among permanents you control.

card.name: Negate
card.property: Counter target noncreature spell.

card.name: Ooze Spill
card.property: Counter target spell. Create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Ray Fillet, Man Ray
card.property: Flying When Ray Fillet enters, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") {2}, Remove a +1/+1 counter from a creature you control: Draw a card.

card.name: Renet, Temporal Apprentice
card.property: Flash When Renet enters, return each other nonland permanent that entered this turn to its owner's hand.

card.name: Retro-Mutation
card.property: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature is a Turtle with base power and toughness 0/1. It can't attack and loses all abilities. (It also loses all other creature types.)

card.name: Return to the Sewers
card.property: Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library. You create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Sewer-veillance Cam
card.property: Flash When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, you may tap or untap target creature. {3}{U}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw two cards.

card.name: Stockman, Mad Fly-entist
card.property: Flying When Stockman enters, draw a card, then discard a card. Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Turtles in Time
card.property: Return all creatures to their owners' hands. Each player may shuffle their hand and graveyard into their library, then each player who does draws seven cards. Exile Turtles in Time.

card.name: Utrom Scientists
card.property: When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Anchovy & Banana Pizza
card.property: When this artifact enters, destroy target creature. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Armaggon, Future Shark
card.property: Flash When Armaggon enters, destroy up to three target creatures.

card.name: Bebop, Warthog Warrior
card.property: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Rhinos you control have menace. Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: The Cloning of Shredder
card.property: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Exile target creature card from your graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary and is a Mutant in addition to its other types. II, III — Create a token that's a copy of a card exiled with this Saga, except it isn't legendary and is a Mutant in addition to its other types.

card.name: Death in the Family
card.property: Exile target creature with mana value 3 or less.

card.name: Dream Beavers
card.property: Flying When this creature enters, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

card.name: Foot Mystic
card.property: Lifelink Disappear — When this creature enters, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, create a 1/1 black Ninja creature token.

card.name: Insectoid Exterminator
card.property: Flying Disappear — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

card.name: Lord Dregg, Insect Invader
card.property: Flying Disappear — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, create a 1/1 black Insect Warrior creature token with flying. {3}{G}, Sacrifice a token: Draw a card.

card.name: Madame Null, Power Broker
card.property: Deathtouch Whenever another creature you control enters, you may pay life equal to its power. If you do, put that many +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Ninja Teen
card.property: (Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.) Whenever a creature you control leaves the battlefield, each opponent loses 1 life. {1}{B}: Level 2 Creatures you control get +1/+0 and have menace. {B}: Level 3 Creature cards in your graveyard have sneak {3}{B}. You may cast creature spells from your graveyard using their sneak abilities.

card.name: Oroku Saki, Shredder Rising
card.property: Sneak {1}{B} (You may cast this spell for {1}{B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Whenever Oroku Saki deals combat damage to a player, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Pain 101
card.property: Until end of turn, target creature gains deathtouch and "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control."

card.name: Paramecia Coloniex
card.property: When this creature enters, mill three cards. (Put the top three cards of your library into your graveyard.) When this creature dies, you may exile it. When you do, put target creature card from your graveyard on top of your library.

card.name: Rat King, Verminister
card.property: Disappear — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, create a 1/1 black Rat creature token and put a +1/+1 counter on Rat King. {T}, Sacrifice three Rats: Return target creature card and all other cards with the same name as that card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Savanti Romero, Time's Exile
card.property: Trample At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Savanti Romero. Then you draw X cards and lose X life, where X is the number of counters on Savanti Romero.

card.name: Shark Shredder, Killer Clone
Shredder, Unrelenting
card.property: Sneak {3}{B} (You may cast this spell for {3}{B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Deathtouch Whenever Shredder enters or attacks, another target creature you control gains deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Shredder's Armor
card.property: Equipped creature gets +2/+1. When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. Equip—Sacrifice another nonland permanent. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Shredder's Revenge
card.property: Choose one — • Target player discards two cards. • Target player draws two cards and loses 2 life.

card.name: Shredder's Technique
card.property: Sneak {B} (You may cast this spell for {B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Destroy target creature or enchantment. If an enchantment was destroyed this way, you lose 2 life.

card.name: South Wind Avatar
card.property: Deathtouch Whenever another creature you control dies, you gain life equal to its toughness. Whenever you gain life, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Splinter, Hamato Yoshi
card.property: Sneak {B} (You may cast this spell for {B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Other Ninjas you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Splinter's Technique
card.property: Sneak {1}{B} (You may cast this spell for {1}{B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Squirrelanoids
card.property: Deathtouch

card.name: Stomped by the Foot
card.property: Kicker—Sacrifice an artifact or creature. (You may sacrifice an artifact or creature in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If this spell was kicked, that creature gets -5/-5 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Super Shredder
card.property: Menace Whenever another permanent leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Super Shredder.

card.name: Tunnel Rats
card.property: {4} {B}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Bot Bashing Time
card.property: Bot Bashing Time deals 6 damage to target creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Broadcast Takeover
card.property: Gain control of all artifacts your opponents control until end of turn. Untap them. They gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Casey Jones, Jury-Rig Justiciar
card.property: Haste When Casey Jones enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal an artifact card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Casey Jones, Vigilante
card.property: When Casey Jones enters, draw three cards. At the beginning of your next upkeep, discard three cards at random.

card.name: Cool but Rude
card.property: (Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.) Whenever you attack, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. {1}{R}: Level 2 Whenever you discard a card, this Class deals 2 damage to each opponent. {1}{R}: Level 3 When this Class becomes level 3, search your library for a card, put it into your hand, shuffle, then discard a card at random.

card.name: General Traag, Heart of Stone
card.property: Trample When General Traag enters, you may sacrifice another artifact. When you do, General Traag deals 4 damage to target creature.

card.name: Hard-Won Jitte
card.property: Equipped creature has double strike. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Improvised Arsenal
Jennika's Technique
card.property: Sneak {R} (You may cast this spell for {R} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Jennika's Technique deals 2 damage to each creature.

card.name: Manhole Missile
card.property: Manhole Missile deals 3 damage to target creature. You may put a card from your hand on the bottom of your library. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Mouser Attack!
card.property: Choose one — • Create a 1/1 colorless Robot artifact creature token. • Target creature gets +3/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Mouser Foundry
card.property: When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, create a 1/1 colorless Robot artifact creature token. {4}{R}, Sacrifice this artifact: It deals 3 damage to target creature.

card.name: Mutant Town Musicians
card.property: Trample Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Null Group Biological Assets
card.property: During your turn, this creature has first strike. Whenever this creature attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Old Hob, Alleycat Blues
card.property: At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 2/2 red Mutant creature token. It gains haste until end of turn. Destroy it at the beginning of the next end step. {1}{W}: Target attacking creature token gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Purple Dragon Punks
card.property: {T}: Add {R}. Spend this mana only to cast an artifact spell or to activate an ability.

card.name: Raphael, Most Attitude
card.property: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, you may exile the top card of your library. Whenever Raphael attacks, until end of turn, you may play a card exiled with Raphael.

card.name: Raphael, Ninja Destroyer
card.property: Raphael must be blocked if able. Enrage — Whenever Raphael is dealt damage, add that much {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Raphael, the Nightwatcher
card.property: Sneak {1}{R}{R} (You may cast this spell for {1}{R}{R} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Attacking creatures you control have double strike.

card.name: Raphael, Tough Turtle
card.property: Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, Raphael deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Raphael's Technique
card.property: Sneak {2}{R} (You may cast this spell for {2}{R} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Each player may discard their hand and draw seven cards.

card.name: Ravenous Robots
card.property: Whenever you cast an artifact spell, create a 1/1 colorless Robot artifact creature token. {R}, {T}: Creature tokens you control gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Rock Soldiers
card.property: When this creature enters, destroy up to one target noncreature artifact.

card.name: Slash, Reptile Rampager
card.property: Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, Slash deals 2 damage to each opponent. Whenever Slash attacks, create a 2/2 red Mutant creature token.

card.name: Spicy Oatmeal Pizza
card.property: When this artifact enters, it deals 4 damage to any target and 3 damage to you. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Wingnut, Bat on the Belfry
card.property: Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, Wingnut gains your choice of flying, menace, or haste until end of turn. Whenever Wingnut attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Zog, Triceraton Castaway
card.property: Reach, trample When Zog enters, target creature can't block this turn. Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Courier of Comestibles
card.property: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a Food card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. If you don't put a card into your hand this way, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Cowabunga!
card.property: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a Mutant, Ninja, Turtle, or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Frog Butler
card.property: Deathtouch {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}: This creature gains reach until end of turn.

card.name: Groundchuck & Dirtbag
card.property: Trample Whenever you tap a land for mana, add {G}.

card.name: Guac & Marshmallow Pizza
card.property: Flash When this artifact enters, target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Untap it. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker
card.property: Trample Leatherhead enters with a hexproof counter on her. Whenever Leatherhead deals combat damage to a player, you may remove a counter from her. When you do, destroy target artifact or enchantment that player controls.

card.name: Michelangelo, Game Master
card.property: Disappear — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Michelangelo.

card.name: Michelangelo, Improviser
card.property: Sneak {2}{G}{G} (You may cast this spell for {2}{G}{G} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Whenever Michelangelo deals combat damage to a player, you may put a creature card and/or a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Michelangelo, Mutant BFF
card.property: Each creature you control with a counter on it can't be blocked by more than one creature. Whenever Michelangelo enters or attacks, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Michelangelo, Weirdness to 11
card.property: When Michelangelo enters, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

card.name: Michelangelo's Technique
card.property: Sneak {3}{G} (You may cast this spell for {3}{G} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Look at the top eight cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards with total mana value 6 or less from among them onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Mona Lisa, Science Geek
card.property: Reach {T}: Add X mana of any one color, where X is Mona Lisa's power.

card.name: Mutagen Man, Living Ooze
card.property: Trample Activated abilities of artifact tokens you control cost {1} less to activate. When Mutagen Man enters, create X Mutagen tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Mutant Chain Reaction
card.property: Destroy up to one target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. Create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: New Generation's Technique
card.property: Sneak {2}{G} (You may cast this spell for {2}{G} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Novel Nunchaku
card.property: When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. When you do, equipped creature fights up to one target creature an opponent controls. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.) Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has trample. Equip {3} ({3}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Party Dude
card.property: (Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.) When this Class enters, each player creates a Food token. {1}{G}: Level 2 Whenever an artifact an opponent controls is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card. {4}{G}: Level 3 Whenever one or more of your opponents are attacked, up to one target attacking creature gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of cards in your hand.

card.name: Primordial Pachyderm
card.property: Reach, trample When this creature enters, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Ragamuffin Raptor
card.property: When this creature enters, return up to one target creature or Food card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Rocksteady, Crash Courser
card.property: Rocksteady can't be blocked by more than one creature. Boars you control can't be blocked by more than one creature. Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Saved by the Shell
card.property: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a Turtle. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains trample, hexproof, and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Tenderize
card.property: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Transdimensional Bovine
card.property: Flying {T}: Add two mana of any one color.

card.name: Turtle Power!
card.property: Flash Turtles you control get +2/+2.

card.name: Venus, Torn Between Worlds
card.property: Whenever Venus is dealt damage, put that many +1/+1 counters on her. (She must survive the damage to get the counters.) Whenever a creature you control with a counter on it deals combat damage to a player, you may pay {U}. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: West Wind Avatar
card.property: Trample Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may sacrifice a token or a land. If you do, you gain 3 life. Disappear — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Zoo Escapees
card.property: When this creature leaves the battlefield, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Baxter Stockman
card.property: When Baxter Stockman enters, create a 1/1 colorless Robot artifact creature token. At the beginning of combat on your turn, target artifact creature you control gets +3/+0 and gains first strike and vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Bebop & Rocksteady
card.property: Whenever Bebop " Rocksteady attack or block, sacrifice a permanent unless you discard a card.

card.name: Brilliance Unleashed
card.property: Choose one or both — • Brilliance Unleashed deals 5 damage to target creature. • Choose target artifact card in your graveyard. Return it to the battlefield if it's an artifact creature card. Otherwise, return it to the battlefield and it's a 3/3 Robot artifact creature with flying.

card.name: Dark Leo & Shredder
Don & Leo, Problem Solvers
card.property: Vigilance At the beginning of your end step, exile up to one target artifact you control and up to one target creature you control. Then return them to the battlefield under their owners' control.

card.name: Don & Raph, Hard Science
card.property: Menace Whenever Don " Raph attack, the next noncreature spell you cast this turn has affinity for artifacts. (It costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.)

card.name: EPF Point Squad
card.property: Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Foot Elite
card.property: Whenever this creature attacks, another target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)

card.name: Foot Ninjas
card.property: Sneak {3}{W/B} (You may cast this spell for {3}{W/B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. It enters tapped and attacking.) When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Genghis Frog
card.property: Trample Whenever Genghis Frog or another Mutant you control enters, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Go Ninja Go
card.property: Choose one or both — • Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. • Go Ninja Go deals damage equal to the greatest power among creatures you control to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Ice Cream Kitty
card.property: {2}, Sacrifice another creature or token: Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Karai, Future of the Foot
card.property: Sneak {2}{W}{B} (You may cast this spell for {2}{W}{B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. She enters tapped and attacking.) Whenever Karai deals combat damage to a player, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. If her sneak cost was paid this turn, instead return that card to the battlefield.

card.name: Karai's Technique
card.property: Sneak {W}{B} (You may cast this spell for {W}{B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Choose one or both — • Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn. • Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Krang & Shredder
card.property: Whenever Krang " Shredder enter or attack, each opponent exiles cards from the top of their library until they exile a nonland card. Disappear — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, you may cast a card exiled with Krang " Shredder without paying its mana cost.

card.name: The Last Ronin
card.property: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Destroy all creatures. II — Mill four cards. When you do, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. III — Whenever a creature you control attacks alone this turn, put three +1/+1 counters on it. It gains trample, lifelink, and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Lessons from Life
card.property: Draw three cards. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Mechanized Ninja Cavalry
card.property: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Robot artifact creature token.

card.name: Mikey & Don, Party Planners
Mikey & Leo, Chaos & Order
card.property: Whenever you put a counter on a creature you control, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Mouser Mark III
card.property: This creature can't attack unless you control another artifact.

card.name: The Neutrinos
card.property: Flying Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, The Neutrinos get +1/+0 until end of turn. Whenever The Neutrinos attack, exile up to one target creature you own, then return it to the battlefield under your control tapped and attacking.

card.name: Nobody
card.property: When this creature enters, return up to one other target artifact you control to its owner's hand. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

card.name: North Wind Avatar
card.property: Flying When this creature enters, if you cast it, you may put a card you own from outside the game into your hand.

card.name: Pizza Face, Gastromancer
card.property: When Pizza Face enters, create a Food token. Disappear — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, put three +1/+1 counters on up to one other target artifact or creature. If it isn't a creature, it becomes a 0/0 Mutant creature in addition to its other types. {1}0}, {T}, Sacrifice Pizza Face: You gain 15 life.

card.name: Punk Frogs
card.property: Ward {3} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {3}.)

card.name: Putrid Pals
card.property: Deathtouch Disappear — This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn.

card.name: Raph & Leo, Sibling Rivals
card.property: Whenever Raph " Leo attack, if it's the first combat phase of the turn, untap one or two target attacking creatures. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers
card.property: Trample, haste Whenever Raph " Mikey attack, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that card onto the battlefield tapped and attacking and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Slithering Cryptid
card.property: When this creature enters, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Splinter, Radical Rat
card.property: If an ability of a Ninja creature you control triggers, that ability triggers an additional time. {1}{U}: Target Ninja can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Tainted Treats
card.property: Destroy target artifact or creature. If its mana value was 4 or less, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Tokka & Rahzar, Terrible Twos
card.property: This spell can't be countered. Menace Whenever a player casts a spell, if the amount of mana spent to cast it was less than its mana value, Tokka " Rahzar deal 3 damage to that player.

card.name: Chrome Dome
card.property: Other artifact creatures you control get +1/+0. {5}: Create a token that's a copy of another target artifact you control. That token gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Everything Pizza
card.property: When this artifact enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}{W}{U}{B}{R}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target player gains 3 life and draws a card. Each of your opponents discards a card. This artifact deals 3 damage to any target. Put three +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature.

card.name: Henchbots
card.property: When this creature enters, exile target tapped creature an opponent controls until this creature leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Krang, Utrom Warlord
card.property: Flying, trample, indestructible, haste Other artifact creatures you control have flying, trample, indestructible, and haste.

card.name: Omni-Cheese Pizza
card.property: When this artifact enters, draw a card. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: The Ooze
card.property: Whenever a creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it leaves the battlefield, create a Mutagen token for each +1/+1 counter on it. (A Mutagen token is an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard. Create a Mutagen token.

card.name: Skateboard
card.property: When this Equipment enters, tap target permanent. Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and has haste. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Technodrome
card.property: Reach, trample This creature can't attack or block unless its power is 6 or greater. {T}, Sacrifice another artifact: Draw a card. Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Turtle Blimp
card.property: Flying When this Vehicle enters, create a 2/2 red Mutant creature token. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Turtle Van
card.property: Whenever this Vehicle attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature that crewed it this turn. Then if that creature is a Mutant, Ninja, or Turtle, double the number of +1/+1 counters on it. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Weather Maker
card.property: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a charge counter on this artifact. {T}: Add one mana of any color. {T}, Remove two charge counters from this artifact: Add {C}{C}. {T}, Remove three charge counters from this artifact: It deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Dimension X
card.property: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Escape Tunnel
card.property: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Target creature with power 2 or less can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Foot Headquarters
card.property: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Illegitimate Business
card.property: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Mutant Town
card.property: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Northampton Farm
card.property: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Exile target creature you own. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Return a creature card exiled with this land to the battlefield under your control. Return each other card exiled with this land to its owner's hand.

card.name: TCRI Building
card.property: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Turtle Lair
card.property: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a Ninja or Turtle spell. {3}, {T}: Target Ninja or Turtle can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Leonardo, Leader in Blue
card.property: Sneak {3}{W}{W} (You may cast this spell for {3}{W}{W} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) When Leonardo enters, if his sneak cost was paid, creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. {1}{W}: Leonardo gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Donatello, Way with Machines
card.property: Flying Whenever an artifact you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Donatello.

card.name: Michelangelo, Mutant BFF
card.property: Each creature you control with a counter on it can't be blocked by more than one creature. Whenever Michelangelo enters or attacks, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Raphael, Most Attitude
card.property: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, you may exile the top card of your library. Whenever Raphael attacks, until end of turn, you may play a card exiled with Raphael.

card.name: Mikey & Leo, Chaos & Order
card.property: Whenever you put a counter on a creature you control, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Krang & Shredder
card.property: Whenever Krang " Shredder enter or attack, each opponent exiles cards from the top of their library until they exile a nonland card. Disappear — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, you may cast a card exiled with Krang " Shredder without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Renet, Temporal Apprentice
card.property: Flash When Renet enters, return each other nonland permanent that entered this turn to its owner's hand.

card.name: Jennika, Bad Apple Big Sister
card.property: When Jennika enters, create a 2/2 red Mutant creature token. Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Bebop & Rocksteady
card.property: Whenever Bebop " Rocksteady attack or block, sacrifice a permanent unless you discard a card.

card.name: Don & Raph, Hard Science
card.property: Menace Whenever Don " Raph attack, the next noncreature spell you cast this turn has affinity for artifacts. (It costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.)

card.name: April, Reporter of the Weird
card.property: Whenever April deals combat damage to a player, draw that many cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Casey Jones, Jury-Rig Justiciar
card.property: Haste When Casey Jones enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal an artifact card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Slash, Reptile Rampager
card.property: Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, Slash deals 2 damage to each opponent. Whenever Slash attacks, create a 2/2 red Mutant creature token.

card.name: Foot Ninjas
card.property: Sneak {3}{W/B} (You may cast this spell for {3}{W/B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. It enters tapped and attacking.) When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Shredder, Unrelenting
card.property: Sneak {3}{B} (You may cast this spell for {3}{B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Deathtouch Whenever Shredder enters or attacks, another target creature you control gains deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Leonardo, Cutting Edge
card.property: Sneak {W} (You may cast this spell for {W} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Lifelink Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Leonardo.

card.name: Donatello, Gadget Master
card.property: Sneak {1}{U} (You may cast this spell for {1}{U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Whenever Donatello deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of target artifact you control.

card.name: Raphael, the Nightwatcher
card.property: Sneak {1}{R}{R} (You may cast this spell for {1}{R}{R} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Attacking creatures you control have double strike.

card.name: Michelangelo, Weirdness to 11
card.property: When Michelangelo enters, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

card.name: Leonardo, Sewer Samurai
Donatello, Mutant Mechanic
card.property: {T}: Put three +1/+1 counters on target artifact you control. If it isn't a creature, it becomes a 0/0 Robot creature in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery. Whenever an artifact you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, if it had counters on it, put those counters on up to one target artifact or creature you control.

card.name: Super Shredder
card.property: Menace Whenever another permanent leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Super Shredder.

card.name: Raphael, Ninja Destroyer
card.property: Raphael must be blocked if able. Enrage — Whenever Raphael is dealt damage, add that much {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Michelangelo, Improviser
card.property: Sneak {2}{G}{G} (You may cast this spell for {2}{G}{G} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Whenever Michelangelo deals combat damage to a player, you may put a creature card and/or a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Dark Leo & Shredder
Krang, Utrom Warlord
card.property: Flying, trample, indestructible, haste Other artifact creatures you control have flying, trample, indestructible, and haste.

card.name: Technodrome
card.property: Reach, trample This creature can't attack or block unless its power is 6 or greater. {T}, Sacrifice another artifact: Draw a card. Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: The Last Ronin's Technique
card.property: Sneak {1}{W} (You may cast this spell for {1}{W} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Create three 1/1 white Ninja Turtle Spirit creature tokens. If this spell's sneak cost was paid, they enter tapped and attacking.

card.name: Leonardo's Technique
card.property: Sneak {1}{W} (You may cast this spell for {1}{W} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Return one or two target creature cards each with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Sally Pride, Lioness Leader
card.property: When Sally Pride enters, create X 2/2 red Mutant creature tokens, where X is the number of nontoken creatures you control. Whenever Sally Pride attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Triceraton Commander
card.property: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, Dinosaurs you control other than this creature get +1/+1 and gain flying until end of turn. When this creature enters, create X 2/2 white Dinosaur Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: April O'Neil, Hacktivist
card.property: At the beginning of your end step, draw a card for each card type among spells you've cast this turn.

card.name: Donatello's Technique
card.property: Sneak {U} (You may cast this spell for {U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Draw two cards.

card.name: Kitsune's Technique
card.property: Sneak {1}{U} (You may cast this spell for {1}{U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Target opponent mills half their library, rounded up.

card.name: Krang, Master Mind
card.property: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) When Krang enters, if you have fewer than four cards in hand, draw cards equal to the difference. Krang gets +1/+0 for each other artifact you control.

card.name: Mondo Gecko
card.property: {1}, Discard a card: Until end of turn, Mondo Gecko becomes the color of your choice and gains hexproof from that color. Whenever Mondo Gecko deals combat damage to a player, draw a card for each color among permanents you control.

card.name: Shredder's Technique
card.property: Sneak {B} (You may cast this spell for {B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Destroy target creature or enchantment. If an enchantment was destroyed this way, you lose 2 life.

card.name: Splinter's Technique
card.property: Sneak {1}{B} (You may cast this spell for {1}{B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Broadcast Takeover
card.property: Gain control of all artifacts your opponents control until end of turn. Untap them. They gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Casey Jones, Vigilante
card.property: When Casey Jones enters, draw three cards. At the beginning of your next upkeep, discard three cards at random.

card.name: Jennika's Technique
card.property: Sneak {R} (You may cast this spell for {R} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Jennika's Technique deals 2 damage to each creature.

card.name: Raphael's Technique
card.property: Sneak {2}{R} (You may cast this spell for {2}{R} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Each player may discard their hand and draw seven cards.

card.name: Groundchuck & Dirtbag
card.property: Trample Whenever you tap a land for mana, add {G}.

card.name: Michelangelo's Technique
card.property: Sneak {3}{G} (You may cast this spell for {3}{G} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Look at the top eight cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards with total mana value 6 or less from among them onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: New Generation's Technique
card.property: Sneak {2}{G} (You may cast this spell for {2}{G} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Bebop & Rocksteady
card.property: Whenever Bebop " Rocksteady attack or block, sacrifice a permanent unless you discard a card.

card.name: Don & Leo, Problem Solvers
card.property: Vigilance At the beginning of your end step, exile up to one target artifact you control and up to one target creature you control. Then return them to the battlefield under their owners' control.

card.name: Don & Raph, Hard Science
card.property: Menace Whenever Don " Raph attack, the next noncreature spell you cast this turn has affinity for artifacts. (It costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.)

card.name: Karai's Technique
card.property: Sneak {W}{B} (You may cast this spell for {W}{B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.) Choose one or both — • Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn. • Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.property: Whenever Krang " Shredder enter or attack, each opponent exiles cards from the top of their library until they exile a nonland card. Disappear — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, you may cast a card exiled with Krang " Shredder without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Mikey & Don, Party Planners
Mikey & Leo, Chaos & Order
card.property: Whenever you put a counter on a creature you control, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: North Wind Avatar
card.property: Flying When this creature enters, if you cast it, you may put a card you own from outside the game into your hand.

card.name: Raph & Leo, Sibling Rivals
card.property: Whenever Raph " Leo attack, if it's the first combat phase of the turn, untap one or two target attacking creatures. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers
card.property: Trample, haste Whenever Raph " Mikey attack, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that card onto the battlefield tapped and attacking and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Splinter, Radical Rat
card.property: If an ability of a Ninja creature you control triggers, that ability triggers an additional time. {1}{U}: Target Ninja can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Tokka & Rahzar, Terrible Twos
card.property: This spell can't be countered. Menace Whenever a player casts a spell, if the amount of mana spent to cast it was less than its mana value, Tokka " Rahzar deal 3 damage to that player.

card.name: Agent Bishop, Man in Black
card.property: At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures.

card.name: Prehistoric Pet
card.property: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. {1}{W}, {T}: Return another target creature you control to its owner's hand. Activate only during your turn.

card.name: Turncoat Kunoichi
card.property: Sneak {2}{W}{B} (You may cast this spell for {2}{W}{B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. It enters tapped and attacking.) When this creature enters, choose target creature an opponent controls. Exile that creature until this creature leaves the battlefield. If this creature's sneak cost was paid, instead exile the chosen creature.

card.name: Turtles Forever
card.property: Search your library and/or outside the game for exactly four legendary creature cards you own with different names, then reveal those cards. An opponent chooses two of them. Put the chosen cards into your hand and shuffle the rest into your library.

card.name: Kitsune, Dragon's Daughter
card.property: Vigilance Whenever Kitsune enters or deals combat damage to a player, you may exchange control of two other target creatures controlled by different players.

card.name: Turtles in Time
card.property: Return all creatures to their owners' hands. Each player may shuffle their hand and graveyard into their library, then each player who does draws seven cards. Exile Turtles in Time.

card.name: Armaggon, Future Shark
card.property: Flash When Armaggon enters, destroy up to three target creatures.

card.name: Madame Null, Power Broker
card.property: Deathtouch Whenever another creature you control enters, you may pay life equal to its power. If you do, put that many +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Rat King, Verminister
card.property: Disappear — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, create a 1/1 black Rat creature token and put a +1/+1 counter on Rat King. {T}, Sacrifice three Rats: Return target creature card and all other cards with the same name as that card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Savanti Romero, Time's Exile
card.property: Trample At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Savanti Romero. Then you draw X cards and lose X life, where X is the number of counters on Savanti Romero.

card.name: Shark Shredder, Killer Clone
South Wind Avatar
card.property: Deathtouch Whenever another creature you control dies, you gain life equal to its toughness. Whenever you gain life, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Improvised Arsenal
Ravenous Robots
card.property: Whenever you cast an artifact spell, create a 1/1 colorless Robot artifact creature token. {R}, {T}: Creature tokens you control gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker
card.property: Trample Leatherhead enters with a hexproof counter on her. Whenever Leatherhead deals combat damage to a player, you may remove a counter from her. When you do, destroy target artifact or enchantment that player controls.

card.name: Mutagen Man, Living Ooze
card.property: Trample Activated abilities of artifact tokens you control cost {1} less to activate. When Mutagen Man enters, create X Mutagen tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Transdimensional Bovine
card.property: Flying {T}: Add two mana of any one color.

card.name: Turtle Power!
card.property: Flash Turtles you control get +2/+2.

card.name: Chrome Dome
card.property: Other artifact creatures you control get +1/+0. {5}: Create a token that's a copy of another target artifact you control. That token gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: The Ooze
card.property: Whenever a creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it leaves the battlefield, create a Mutagen token for each +1/+1 counter on it. (A Mutagen token is an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard. Create a Mutagen token.

card.name: Turtle Van
card.property: Whenever this Vehicle attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature that crewed it this turn. Then if that creature is a Mutant, Ninja, or Turtle, double the number of +1/+1 counters on it. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Weather Maker
card.property: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a charge counter on this artifact. {T}: Add one mana of any color. {T}, Remove two charge counters from this artifact: Add {C}{C}. {T}, Remove three charge counters from this artifact: It deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Northampton Farm
card.property: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Exile target creature you own. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Return a creature card exiled with this land to the battlefield under your control. Return each other card exiled with this land to its owner's hand.

card.name: Leonardo, Cutting Edge
card.property: Sneak {W} (You may cast this spell for {W} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Lifelink Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Leonardo.

card.name: April O'Neil, Hacktivist
card.property: At the beginning of your end step, draw a card for each card type among spells you've cast this turn.

card.name: Donatello, Gadget Master
card.property: Sneak {1}{U} (You may cast this spell for {1}{U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Whenever Donatello deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of target artifact you control.

card.name: Turtles in Time
card.property: Return all creatures to their owners' hands. Each player may shuffle their hand and graveyard into their library, then each player who does draws seven cards. Exile Turtles in Time.

card.name: Super Shredder
card.property: Menace Whenever another permanent leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Super Shredder.

card.name: Casey Jones, Vigilante
card.property: When Casey Jones enters, draw three cards. At the beginning of your next upkeep, discard three cards at random.

card.name: Raphael, the Nightwatcher
card.property: Sneak {1}{R}{R} (You may cast this spell for {1}{R}{R} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Attacking creatures you control have double strike.

card.name: Michelangelo, Weirdness to 11
card.property: When Michelangelo enters, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

card.name: Dark Leo & Shredder
Krang, Utrom Warlord
card.property: Flying, trample, indestructible, haste Other artifact creatures you control have flying, trample, indestructible, and haste.

card.name: Leonardo, Cutting Edge
card.property: Sneak {W} (You may cast this spell for {W} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Lifelink Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Leonardo.

card.name: April O'Neil, Hacktivist
card.property: At the beginning of your end step, draw a card for each card type among spells you've cast this turn.

card.name: Donatello, Gadget Master
card.property: Sneak {1}{U} (You may cast this spell for {1}{U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Whenever Donatello deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of target artifact you control.

card.name: Turtles in Time
card.property: Return all creatures to their owners' hands. Each player may shuffle their hand and graveyard into their library, then each player who does draws seven cards. Exile Turtles in Time.

card.name: Super Shredder
card.property: Menace Whenever another permanent leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Super Shredder.

card.name: Casey Jones, Vigilante
card.property: When Casey Jones enters, draw three cards. At the beginning of your next upkeep, discard three cards at random.

card.name: Raphael, the Nightwatcher
card.property: Sneak {1}{R}{R} (You may cast this spell for {1}{R}{R} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Attacking creatures you control have double strike.

card.name: Michelangelo, Weirdness to 11
card.property: When Michelangelo enters, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

card.name: Dark Leo & Shredder
Krang, Utrom Warlord
card.property: Flying, trample, indestructible, haste Other artifact creatures you control have flying, trample, indestructible, and haste.

card.name: Leonardo, Sewer Samurai
Donatello, Mutant Mechanic
card.property: {T}: Put three +1/+1 counters on target artifact you control. If it isn't a creature, it becomes a 0/0 Robot creature in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery. Whenever an artifact you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, if it had counters on it, put those counters on up to one target artifact or creature you control.

card.name: Raphael, Ninja Destroyer
card.property: Raphael must be blocked if able. Enrage — Whenever Raphael is dealt damage, add that much {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Michelangelo, Improviser
card.property: Sneak {2}{G}{G} (You may cast this spell for {2}{G}{G} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. He enters tapped and attacking.) Whenever Michelangelo deals combat damage to a player, you may put a creature card and/or a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Shark Shredder, Killer Clone
